notes: Japan are without pre-tournament absentees Wataru Endo (foot, retired internationally), Kaoru Mitoma (hamstring), and Takumi Minamino (ACL), while in-tournament attacker Takefusa Kubo is ruled out with a knee injury and Shuto Machino is listed as questionable (illness) — significant creative losses. Sweden have no confirmed in-tournament suspensions or injuries to key first-team players, though Eric Smith is listed as questionable and wing-backs Gudmundsson and Ayari carry yellow-card caution…
home_scorers: Ayase Ueda (leading striker, brace vs Tunisia, focal point of attack)
Daichi Kamada (attacking midfielder, 2 tournament goals, set-piece taker)
Ritsu Doan (wide attacker, creative outlet post-Kubo injury)
away_scorers: Viktor Gyokeres (co-leading striker, physical focal point, must-win game)
Alexander Isak (co-leading striker, transitional threat, clinical finisher)
Yasin Ayari (attacking midfielder, 2 tournament goals, late runs into box)
